audit_items.proof_trace: Fork trigger is gated by exact slot equality check (line 459: `Toption::Some(last_slot_in_phase) == fulu_fork_slot`) where fulu_fork_slot = fulu_fork_epoch * SLOTS_PER_EPOCH. After upgrade, state becomes BeaconState::Fulu (line 460), and subsequent match arm (line 465) contains no fork upgrade logic. The epoch recorded in Fork struct (fork.rs:677,726) is computed from state.slot at upgrade time, which equals fulu_fork_slot, thus equals fulu_fork_epoch. Property holds: upgrade fires exactly once at FULU_FORK_EPOCH.
